weapon.OPUS_ETCH_FIGURE.skill.SUPPRESSIO.text: ATK +{atk_up:0.0%}. When the wielder's battle skill applies Nature Infliction, other operators in the team gain Arts DMG Dealt +{spell_dmg_up:0.0%} for {duration:0}s. For every enemy suffering from Nature Infliction applied by the said battle skill, other operators in the team gain bonus Arts DMG Dealt +{spell_dmg_up2:0.0%}, up to a max of +{spell_dmg_up2*max_stack:0.0%}. Effects of the same name cannot stack.

weapon.OPUS_ETCH_FIGURE.status.OPUS_ETCH.text: Arts DMG Dealt bonus for teammates from Nature Infliction. Per-enemy stacking bonus up to 3.
